Limitation of Liability: Liability must be capped at 100% of the Purchase Order (PO) or contract value. A mutual cap stating 'neither party's liability shall exceed the PO value' is acceptable.
The liability cap must use strong qualifying language, preferably starting with 'Notwithstanding anything to the contrary' or 'In no event'.
Carve-outs to the liability cap are strictly limited to IP Infringement,criminal negligence, fraud, willful misconduct,confidential breach. Reject any carve-outs for insurance or any other reasons.
This clause must explicitly exclude consequential, indirect, and special damages, unless there is already a separate standalone clause covering this exclusion.
Indemnity: All indemnification obligations must be explicitly qualified with 'to the extent caused by supplier negligence'.
Indemnification for personal injury, death, or property damage is acceptable ONLY IF tied to the extent of supplier's negligence.
All indemnity obligations must remain subject to the overall limitation of liability cap. The ONLY exception to the cap is for criminal negligence.
Warranty: Warranties are strictly limited to material and workmanship and terms guranntee be changed to warranty. Reject any warranties regarding design othen than functional design.
The warranty tenure must be strictly defined as 18 months from the date of supply OR 12 months from the date of installation, whichever is lower.
Liability for latent defects is strictly capped at a maximum of 3 years.
Software is provided 'AS IS' without implied warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose.
We warrant that the software will substantially conform to the documentation for 90 days.
No guarantee that the software will be uninterrupted or completely error-free.
Insurance: We can issue insurance certificates naming the customer as an 'Additional Insured'.
Reject any requirements to carry 'Product Liability Insurance'.
Reject any requirements for 'Waiver of Subrogation'.
Reject any requirements for project-specific special insurance. The only acceptable exception is Transit Insurance.
We will maintain Commercial General Liability insurance with limits not less than $1,000,000 per occurrence.
We will maintain Cyber Liability insurance with limits of $2,000,000.
